revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''2-3-220

A filament (usually of multi-vee formation) in the form of a segment of a hollow truncated cone or hollow cylinder, generated around the axis of the lamp and embracing an arc of a circle greater than 180 degrees but not fully closed.

[[Image:Ch2_Fig31.jpg|400px|border]]


Note: For the French and German terms applicable, see 2-3-210 and 2-3-215.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Bunch Filament (G.B.)}}
